      the authentic adulthood initiatory processes from

      Possibility Management ignite unquenchable inspiration...

       

      This website offers evidence

      that this claim might be true!

    • Paying Respects

      Here we pay homage to Possibility Managers and agents of evolution who have completed their work this lifetime.

      We thank you and and honor you for all that you have created and given to us, and for allowing us to be in Liquid State intimacies with you for all those precious years.

      René Daumal

      d. 1944

      Author of: Mount Analogue.

      Pyotr Demianovich Ouspenskii

      d. 1947

      Author of: In Search of the Miraculous, The Psychology of Man's Possible Evolution, and, The Fourth Way.

      Georgii Ivanovitch Gurdjieff

      d. 1949

      Originator of The Fourth Way. Author of: Meetings With Remarkable Men, Life Is Real Only Then When I Am, and Gurdjieff's Early Talks.

      Olaf Stapledon

      d. 1950

      Author of: Starmaker, Last and First Men, and Odd John.

      Aldous Huxley

      d. 1963

      Author of: Island.

      Eric Berne

      d. 1970

      Originator of Transactional Analysis. Author of: Games People Play.

      John Godolphin Bennett

      d. 1974

      Author of Witness, Values, Idiots In Paris, Transformation, Life Is Real Only Then, When 'I am', The Masters of Wisdom, and many others.

      Philip K. Dick

      d. 1982

      Author of: Bladerunner (AKA Do Androids Dream of Electric Sheep?), Minority Report, Total Recall, Ubik, Valis, The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch, Radio Free Albemuth, and many others.

      R. Buckminster Fuller

      d. 1983

      Originator of the geodesic dome, etc. Author of: Critical Path, and Grunch of Giants.

      Frank Herbert

      d. 1986

      Author of: Dune.

      Robert S. de Ropp

      d. 1987

      Author of: The Master Game, Warrior's Way, and Self Completion.

      Robert A. Heinlein

      d. 1988

      Author of: Methuselah's Children, Time Enough For Love, Stranger In A Strange Land, The Moon Is A Harsh Mistress, Glory Road, and The Number of the Beast. Clinton had lunch with Robert and Virginia Heinlein at the San Diego Comic-Con 20-24 July 1977, where they started a blood drive. That first year, 148 pints of blood were collected. San Diego Blood Bank estimates that more than 300,000 lives have been helped over the course of our 49 years hosting the blood drive!

      Parker Dickson

      d. 1991

      Student of E. J. Gold. Creator and singer of the Fourth Way Folksongs. Also at Fourth Way Folksongs.

      Carlos Castaneda

      d. 1998

      Author of: Journey to Ixtlan.

      Harvey Jackins

      d. 1999

      Originator and principal theorist of Re-evaluation Counseling (Co-Counseling). Clinton met him at his ‘Love, Sex and loneliness’ workshop Thursday, 27 September 1972 at Cal Poly, San Luis Obispo.

      José Silva

      d. 1999

      Originator of Silva Method. Author of: The Silva Mind Control Method.

      John C. Lilly

      d. 2001

      Originator of Earth Coincidence Control Office (E.C.C.O.). Author of: Programming the Human Biocomputer, and The Center of the Cyclone.

      Thomas Gordon

      d. 2002

      Originator of Parent Effectiveness Training. Author of P. E. T. Parent Effectiveness Training.

      Ken Windes

      d. 2005

      Co-originator of The Game, a radical transformational guerilla street theater training that morphed into The Event.

      Alfred Fisches

      d. ~2006

      Possibilitator.

      Kurt Vonnegut Jr.

      d. 2007

      Promoter of cultural relativity. Author of: Cat's Cradle, and Sirens of Titan.

      Lyall Watson

      d. 2008

      Author of: Gifts of Unknown Things, Lifetide, Lightning Bird, Supernature, and Dark Nature.

      Marilyn Ferguson

      d. 2008

      Author of: The Aquarian Conspiracy, and Aquarius Now.

      Lee Lozowick

      d. 2010

      Originator of the Western Baul Tradition of the Hohm Community in Arizona. Author of many books, including: In The Fire, Conscious Parenting, The Alchemy of Love and Sex, and Getting Real.

      Arnaud Desjardins

      d. 2011

      Originator of Hauteville in France. Author of: The Jump Into Life, Toward The Fullness Of Life, and Not What Should Be But What Is.

      Gabriela Brockman

      d. 2014

      Possibilitator.

      Iris Sümenicht

      d. 2014

      Possibilitator.

      Marshall Rosenberg

      d. 2015

      Originator of Nonviolent Communication (NVC). Author of: Nonviolent Communication, and Living Nonviolent Communication.

      robert wolff

      d. 2015

      Author of: Original Wisdom, and Earth Abides.

      Terry Pratchett

      d. 2015

      Author of the Tiffany Aching series in the diswcorld stories, plus Thief of Time.

      Joseph Chilton Pearce

      d. 2016

      Author of: The Crack In The Cosmic Egg, Exploring The Crack In The Cosmic Egg, Magical Child, Magical Parent Magical Child, From Magical Child To Magical Teen, and Magical Child Matures.

      Dorothy Bryant

      d. 2017

      Author of: The Kin Of Ata Are Waiting For You.

      Ron Bosanquet

      d. 2017

      Originator and spaceholder of the Gurdjieff Foundation School near Sydney, Australia, in the 1980s. Clinton's first teacher. A man of presence, discipline, perception, and unusual greatness.

      He left few photographs, but a deep imprint.

      Daniel Quinn

      d. 2018

      Author of: Ishmael, My Ishmael, and The Story Of B.

      Dave Ewoldt

      d. 2018

      Originator of Coalitions Of Mutual Endeavor. Author of: Connect The Dots: a roadmap for critical systems change.

      Manitonquat

      d. 2018

      Originator of Circle Way. Star of the Circle Way Film (featuring Clinton Callahan).

      Ursula K. Le Guin

      d. 2018

      Author of: A Wizard of Earthsea trilogy, and The Left Hand of Darkness.

      Barbara Marx Hubbarad

      d. 2019

      Originator of Foundation for Conscious Evolution. Author of: Conscious Evolution. Interviewed by the Gaian Road Team.

      Bert Hellinger

      d. 2019

      Originator of Family Constellations.

      Charly Rainer Ehrenpreis

      d. 2019

      Minstrel of Tamera. Video 1. Video 2.

      Claudio Naranjo

      d. 2019

      Originator of SAT (Seekers After Truth). Author of: Ennea-type Structures: self-analasys for the Seeker. Interviewed by Gaian Road Team.

      John Welwood

      d. 2019

      Director of the East/West Psychology Program at the California Institute of Integral Studies in San Francisco, and an associate editor of Journal of Transpersonal Psychology. Author of: Perfect Love Imperfect Relationships. Interviewed by Gaian Road Team.

      Polly Higgins

      d. 2019

      Originator of the movement to Stop Ecocide, and create Ecocide Law. Author of: Eradicating Ecocide, Dare To Be Great, and Earth Is Our Business: changing the rules of the game.

      Werner Kamm

      d. 2019

      Possibilitator.

      Gustav A. Hossenfelder

      d. 2021

      Energy healer. Author of: Re-ligio Der Heilung (in German).

      Jeff Worob

      d. 2021

      Possibilitator. Student of Lee Lozowick.

      Malidoma Patrice Somé

      d. 2021

      Author of: Of Water And The Spirit.

      Barbara Brennan

      d. 2022

      Originator of Barbara Brennan's School of Healing. Author of: Hands Of Light.

      Dan Palmer

      d. 2022

      Possibilitator.

      John Renesch

      d. 2022

      Author of: The Great Growing Up. Interviewed by the Gaian Road Team.

      John Pilger

      d. 2023

      Prolific docu filmmaker. Author of: The New Rulers Of The World, Freedom Next Time, and Tell Me No Lies.

      Keith Johnstone

      d. 2023

      Author of: Impro, and Impro for Storytellers.

      Klaus (Odjo) Strese

      d. 2023

      Possibilitator.

      Te Waari Carkeek

      d. 2023

      Maori historian and story teller. Interviewed by the Gaian Road Team.

      Arnold Mindell

      d. 2024

      Originator of Process Oriented Psychology. Author of: Sitting In The Fire, The Shaman's Body, and The Leader As Martial Artist.

      Elisabet Sahtouris

      d. 2024

      Evolution biologist and futurist. Author of: Earth Dance, and Vista.

      Valerie Lankford

      d. 2024

      Originator of the 4 Feelings thoughtmap. Author of: Four Feelings And What To Do With Them.

      Jane Goodall

      d. 2025

      The Jane Goodall Institute, which Jane founded in 1977, now funds scientific research and conservation projects around the world.

      Joana Macy

      d. 2025

      Originator of The Work That Reconnects. Author of: Active Hope, and, Coming Back to Life.

      Frank Beeh

      d. 2026

      Possibilitator. Lender in Archiarchy Kiva: kiva.org/lender/frank9123, and member of Inla Kesh in Mexico.

      Ingrid Schmithüsen

      d. 2026

      Possibilitator. Singer. Conscious Death researcher.

    • StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code POSMNGRS.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By accepting, you agree the use of cookies. Learn More
      Accept all
      Settings
      Decline All
      ×
      What Are Cookies?

      Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

      Our Cookies

      When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

      In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

      Third-Party cookies

      In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

      How To Disable Cookies?

      Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By continuing we assume you accept the use of cookies.
